[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] '''Jelon''' was [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Winstel Greelanx]]'s second-in-command during the [[Battle of Nar Shaddaa (4 BBY)|Battle of Nar Shaddaa]].

*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' {{1st}}
